name: Pack Of 12 - Spectrum Gusto Soup For Cat With Tuna Mackerel And Broccoli 50g
description: Treat your cat to the nutritious Spectrum Gusto Cat Soup with Tuna, Mackerel, and Broccoli. This high-moisture 50g pouch combines 15.4% tuna fillet, 10% mackerel, and 4.7% broccoli in a flavorful fish broth. Rich in protein and omega-3 fatty acids, it supports a healthy skin and coat while providing hydration for cats and kittens. Perfect as a daily snack, reward, or meal topper, it enhances mealtime enjoyment without replacing a balanced diet. Key Features: Real tuna and mackerel for lean protein and omega-3s. Broccoli adds minerals, fiber, and digestive support. Hydrating broth encourages fluid intake. Convenient 50g pouch for portion control. Suitable for cats and kittens. Feeding Guidelines: Serve in small portions with a spoon. Complementary treat; not a complete meal. Always provide fresh water.
